title: goniophlebium cyathoides
intro: Goniophlebium cyathoides, also known as the Cyathodium fern, is a rare and endangered species of epiphytic fern found in tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium cyathoides are said to include the treatment of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
